attractions.name: Paro (Rinpung) Dzong
attractions.description: Fortress of Jewels built using stones rather than clay, excellent example of 15th-century architecture, serves as government center of Paro

attractions.name: Ta Dzong (National Museum)
attractions.description: Cylindrical watchtower built in 1649, converted to National Museum in 1968, spiral-shaped building with antiques, art, textiles, weapons and household items

attractions.name: Kyichu Lhakhang
attractions.description: One of the oldest temples in Bhutan built during 7th century by Tibetan Emperor

attractions.name: Tiger's Nest (Taktsang Monastery)
attractions.description: Most popular site of Bhutan built on 900 meters high cliff, where Guru Padmasambhava landed on back of tigress in 8th century, one hour hike to cafeteria
